title: neottia nidus-avis
intro: Neottia nidus-avis, also known as bird's nest orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally used in medicine, this plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Neottia nidus-avis are thought to include antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and promote immune system balance. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
